name: healthtech-advisor
description: Strategic advisory for digital health and healthtech founders covering HIPAA scope, FDA SaMD vs non-SaMD classification, EHR integration patterns, payor/provider/employer GTM, and value-based care models. Complements the RA/QM compliance domain with software-side strategic guidance. Use when scoping a healthtech idea, classifying PHI, picking a GTM, or when the user mentions HIPAA, PHI, FDA SaMD, EHR integration, telehealth, or digital therapeutics.
